recap.headline: 曼联 0–1 雷克瑟姆
recap.summary: 曼联主场以 0–1 不敌雷克瑟姆。本场进球：Sam Smith（39'）。比赛在Helsinki Olympic Stadium进行。

goals.name: Sam Smith
goals.text: Goal! Manchester United 0, Wrexham 1. Sam Smith (Wrexham) right footed shot from the right side of the six yard box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Lewis O'Brien.
